correction_detail.reason: Our data reflected a stale or pre-earnings trailing PE. Post Q1 2026 results, META trailing PE is consistently reported at ~28.0x across FinanceCharts, Macrotrends, Investing.com, and companiesmarketcap. Deviation was 20.3%, exceeding the 20% correction threshold.
